criteria.name: implementors_identified
criteria.description: Correctly identifies all 6 files implementing the Embedder trait: gemini.rs, mock.rs, ollama.rs, onnx.rs, openai.rs, openrouter.rs.
criteria.groundTruth: src/embedder/gemini.rs, src/embedder/mock.rs, src/embedder/ollama.rs, src/embedder/onnx.rs, src/embedder/openai.rs, src/embedder/openrouter.rs

criteria.name: call_sites_identified
criteria.description: Correctly identifies main call sites: src/engine/searcher.rs (calls embed) and src/engine/indexer.rs (calls embed_batch). Also accepts test files.
criteria.groundTruth: src/engine/searcher.rs calling embed, src/engine/indexer.rs calling embed_batch

criteria.name: blast_radius_assessed
criteria.description: Correctly assesses the blast radius, including the database storage layer (src/store/mod.rs or sqlite-vec integration) and type definitions (src/types.rs) where embeddings are saved or manipulated.
criteria.groundTruth: Database layer (src/store/mod.rs / SQLite vector storage) and types module (src/types.rs).
